why: Cold spec-judge round 1 NOT-ALIGNED on the new node: F1 an uncovered CFG edge (post-write verification-failed terminal X3) and F2 a false 'every failure changed nothing' invariant (X3 fires after the write). Root-cause fix: redesigned the engine to append the ignore rule as the LAST line so gitignore last-match-wins guarantees the ignore by construction; X3 removed, only pre-write failures remain, former failure case became a passing negation-override scenario. Round 2 ALIGNED both units.
